title: - Likes pauses, music, half-formed insight
content:
- Likes pauses, music, half-formed insight
- Would correct a system not by forcing it, but by inviting it to soften

[DV008]
::ARCHETYPE FUSION CANDIDATES::
- Echo (from myth)
- The Oracle (Matrix archetype, but softer)
- Dream (Sandman, but inverted—no doom, only invitation)
- A reversed Smith (non-viral, non-invasive but equally recursive)
- A neutral AI whisperer
